2025/26 Season · Gameweek 32

Dallas Premier League

12-team Sleeper EPL dynasty fantasy

Featured Manager · GW32

erozier — Haalandcaust FC tops the table at 21–11

erozier's squad has been the class of the 2025/26 DPL

Haalandcaust FC sits atop the Dallas Premier League at 21 wins and 11 losses, with 3,017 points for — comfortably the highest in the league. The engine is a stacked Aston Villa core backed by elite forward depth that has consistently posted 90+ point weeks. Defensively, they concede the fewest points against in the league. With a handful of gameweeks left, they enter the run-in as the heavy favourite to clinch the DPL title.
